CVE-2016-6354.title: Heap-based buffer overflow in the yy_get_next_buffer function in  ...
CVE-2016-6354.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in the yy_get_next_buffer function in Flex before 2.6.1 might allow context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service or possibly execute arbitrary code via vectors involving num_to_read.

CVE-2019-6293.title: An issue was discovered in the function mark_beginning_as_normal  ...
CVE-2019-6293.description: An issue was discovered in the function mark_beginning_as_normal in nfa.c in flex 2.6.4. There is a stack exhaustion problem caused by the mark_beginning_as_normal function making recursive calls to itself in certain scenarios involving lots of '*' characters. Remote attackers could leverage this vulnerability to cause a denial-of-service.
